narrative:
Precinct Franklin Twp (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 1,398 registered voters, with 54.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.7 percentage points.
